title: E2E Test Decision
intent: Should we launch a new enterprise product line targeting Fortune 500 companies?
context: Market research shows 73% demand for AI-powered solutions in enterprise segment

options.title: Proceed with launch
options.description: Move forward with the initiative as planned, committing resources and timeline.
options.expectedBenefit: First-mover advantage, market opportunity capture, momentum building
options.expectedCost: Full resource commitment, higher burn rate

options.title: Deliberate further
options.description: Gather more data, run experiments, and validate assumptions before committing.
options.expectedBenefit: Reduced risk, better-informed decision, stakeholder alignment
options.expectedCost: Delayed value realization, continued analysis cost
options.expectedRisk: May miss timing window, analysis paralysis

options.title: Maintain current course
options.description: Continue existing operations without changes. Revisit at the next review cycle.
options.expectedBenefit: No disruption, preserved resources, trend observation time
